text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's fall, and both Agnes Digital and<n>King Halo
have started gearing up for<n>the Mile
Championship. However...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Oooooh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable! King Halo has finished<n>seventh! She
had us on our toes for a<n>second, but it appears
she's still got<n>a long ways to go before she's
back<n>in top shape!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, wheeze... Ngh! Why isthis happening...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, King...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's still on her road to recovery.<n>After the
audience leaves the<n>racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hey, King...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Digital? You came to watch me?<n>Thanks, but
please just leave me be.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...But I can't really say that to you,<n>can I? Very
well, I grant you the right<n>to join me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: O-okay. So, ummm... About the race<n>today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You might not have won, but you<n>were still
amazing. I'm just<n>awestruck by you ability—it hits
me<n>every time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your last spurt down the final stretch,<n>the elegance
in your running form,<n>and the beautiful way you
handle the<n>turns...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All I could think was, "This is<n>first-rate! King is the
most first-rate of<n>all first-rates!"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And so... Well...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Is that all?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is that the only reason you thought I<n>was
first-rate?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uh, no! Nonononono! There's more!Like your flowing hair! And the loud,proud way you laugh! And yourstylish signature racewear. And that caboose—ooh, whoopsie.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That's quite a list... Still, all ofthose things are trivial.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There's something far more<n>important when it
comes to being<n>first-rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
At any rate. You've come all the way<n>here, so
why don't you have a run<n>with me around the
track?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A serious run, of course. No one else<n>is around, so
we can really let<n>ourselves go.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: S-sure...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The two get permission to use the<n>track and begin
their private<n>scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, wheeze... Hoo...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: King...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
King Halo loses the scrimmage<n>without much
fanfare. Already<n>exhausted from today's race,
she<n>doesn't push herself beyond her<n>limit.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehehehe... Pathetic, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What do you think now, Digital? Was<n>I beautiful
and elegant like before, or<n>am I just a tired,
worn-out<n>Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How can I be first-rate when there's<n>not a
modicum of first-rate left in me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Um... Th-that's...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Here I am, effortlessly outstripped by<n>even a
classic-year runner. I'm just<n>a weak and tired
loser.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But even if I'm but a mere shadow of<n>my past
self...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Dusk quietly creeps in.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There's still tomorrow, isn't there?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll lose again... but there's<n>yet another
tomorrow to come.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What if I choose to simply not give<n>up? What if I
choose to keep running<n>and keep losing until I
win? What<n>then?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Look at me, Digital. Tell me the truth.<n>Is there really
anything first-rate left<n>about me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Th-there...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There is! You still have it! You're as<n>unwavering
as the light of the Flying<n>Dutchman!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The Flying what? ...What are you<n>talking about?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I mean...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm talking about your unflagging<n>tenacity. How
you never sink, no<n>matter how many licks you
take.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's true. No one can take away<n>my
persistence.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter how many times I<n>lose, or how
many times I'm laughed<n>at or ridiculed.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've told everyone that I'm first-rate.<n>That's why,
even if I fall and eat dust<n>more than anyone else,
I've always<n>changed myself and stood back up.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No matter how far I fall, I will never<n>give up hope!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That is what makes me<n>first-rate—now and
forever!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... King!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even when she's beaten and<n>battered, King
Halo's beauty doesn't<n>fade.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Do you get it, Digital? Do youunderstand what makes me me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I hear you, King. I've taken your<n>words to
heart.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Have you? Then, do you understand<n>what it
means for Umamusume to<n>run?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Yes... We can't feel inferior.<n>There's no time
for that when we<n>run!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's correct. Whether you've<n>gotten a late start
or stumbled to the<n>ground, there's nothing you
can't<n>recover from!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's why I will recover my formbefore the Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Feeling bad for me... Or holding back<n>when you run
against me...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Those things are an insult to me as a<n>first-rate
Umamusume. And to your<n>own abilities as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Right... That's right... I... had it all<n>wrong.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You've taught me a fragment of what<n>it means to
be first-rate... and I'll hold<n>it close to my heart.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best to train for the Mile<n>Championship!
I'll make you proud!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know that I shouldn't be fangirling<n>super hard
when I'm supposed to be<n>in serious training
mode, but... I've<n>gotta say it...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You are every bit as divine as I<n>thought.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital brings her hands<n>together as if to
offer a prayer. It's a<n>gesture that seems a bit
silly... yet it<n>communicates her unwavering
respect.
